scripts.db:migrate: sh -c 'command -v docker >/dev/null || { echo "docker CLI is required"; exit 127; }; until docker compose exec -T postgres pg_isready -U postgres -d content_factory; do sleep 1; done; docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U postgres -d content_factory < ../db/migrations/001_initial_schema.sql'
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d postgres && npm run db:migrate
